chunks.content:
Article: Adams embryo in opening
[]: Adam's embryo in opening?             Quote Post by Podferio » Fri Oct 22, 2010 8:36 pm I'm re-watching NGE and I noticed that at around 1:14 of the opening song, adam's emryo is shown. There are words written on its container and there's a prase/sentence/comment there that I can't make up. Maybe someone with br rip can read it for us? Here's what I can understand so far: SAMPLE A-01 ADAM (Could be Angel-01 or Adam-01) CAUTION What bothers me about this though is the "Sample". Could it be that the embryo is just a perfect clone or something? IDK

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 23, 2010 2:23 am The phrase is along the lines of "Who is man why is he crying?"

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Oct 23, 2010 3:01 am Mr. Tines wrote: The phrase is along the lines of "Who is man why is he crying?"

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Oct 23, 2010 4:49 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: (actually the "why?" is placed at the end, it should be something like "Who is man? He is crying. Why?").

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 23, 2010 10:07 am More here -- http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4396

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 23, 2010 11:17 am Since the text doesn't even look like it contains the word "crying", to me this demonstrates how bizarrely effective the power of suggestion can be. There's that whole other thread for discussing what the text is, so I won't discuss that here.
